general.author: Rita Patel
general.body: Hey team — checking in on Q3 pipeline. Vibeface has my daily brief ready.

text.text: TechStart QBR prep.

Your morning state: *$410K on track* / *$90K needs you* / *$0 blocked*

2 deals need your attention: Runners Club (budget objection) and Sporty Nation (champion silent). Open the Slackbot panel on the right →
Review
Dismiss

general.author: Rita Patel
general.body: What about the Acme situation? Marcus left.

text.text: Champion departed: Acme Corp

Marcus Lee left Acme in the last 48 hours. Vibeface identified *Priya Shah* (via Sarah Chen) and *Daniel Kim* (VP Procurement, attended your Q1 webinar) as potential new champions. Intro draft ready for review.
Review draft
Dismiss

sales.author: Rita Patel
sales.body: TechStart QBR is at 2 PM today. Vibeface prepped my talking points.

text.text: Meeting prep ready for *TechStart QBR* at 2:00 PM. Sarah Chen (champion) is active. Deal: $95K, Proposal stage. Talking points: QBR recap, expansion options, timeline to close.
View brief

sales.author: Rita Patel
sales.body: SmartFit replied to the follow-up — positive tone. Vibeface handled it.

q3-pipeline.author: Rita Patel
q3-pipeline.body: Pipeline review for Q3. Gap is $100K — built a plan with Vibeface. Greentech, Runners Club, Meridian, Nova Corp in motion.

text.text: Plan status: *$430K on track* after Greentech SOW sent. Runners Club intro from Sarah Chen — Jordan Hayes interested in 30-min call. Meridian and Apex still in motion.
Proactive insights for today
Hi Rita! Here's where you stand:
Focus: Runners Club (budget objection) and Sporty Nation (champion silent). Vibeface has drafts ready.
View Seller Edge

deal-acme.author: Rita Patel
deal-acme.body: Marcus was our champion — he left. Need to identify new stakeholders ASAP.

text.text:
*Acme Corp* — Champion departed

Marcus Lee no longer at Acme. Vibeface identified:
• *Priya Shah* — Sarah Chen intro, same team
• *Daniel Kim* — VP Procurement, attended Q1 webinar

Intro draft ready. Commission at risk: ~$14K.

deal-acme.author: Rita Patel
deal-acme.body: Sent intro to Priya via Sarah. Daniel Kim — can we pull the webinar attendee list?

deal-runners.author: Rita Patel
deal-runners.body: CFO Jordan Hayes joined the last call. Asked about ROI. Proposal opened 6x since.

text.text:
*Runners Club* — Budget objection

Value justification deck drafted. Lisa Park (champion) still engaged. Jordan Hayes (CFO) needs ROI clarity before sign-off.
Review draft

deal-runners.author: Rita Patel
deal-runners.body: 30-min call with Jordan set for 4 PM. Vibeface prepping the value deck.

deal-greentech.author: Rita Patel
deal-greentech.body: Priya said 'just send me the SOW and I'll get it signed this week.' SOW sent.

text.text:
*Greentech* — $60K, Proposal stage

Champion Priya Shah actively closing. SOW sent. No risk signals. On track for commit.

deal-greentech.author: Rita Patel
deal-greentech.body: Following up with Priya on SOW. She's been responsive.

deal-sporty.author: Rita Patel
deal-sporty.body: Dana went silent. Proposal viewed 14x, no reply. Company doing layoffs — procurement likely frozen.

text.text:
*Sporty Nation* — Champion silent 14 days

Vibeface identified 2 alternate stakeholders: Mike Torres (Ops) and Jen Walsh (Marketing). Both engaged on LinkedIn. Outreach draft ready.

deal-sporty.author: Rita Patel
deal-sporty.body: Reaching out to Mike Torres. Dana's team might be in flux.

deal-techstart.author: Rita Patel
deal-techstart.body: QBR at 2 PM tomorrow. Sarah Chen is our champion. $95K expansion on the table.

text.text:
*TechStart QBR* — 2:00 PM today

Sarah Chen (champion) active. Talking points: QBR recap, expansion options, timeline to close. Brief ready in Seller Edge.
View brief

deal-techstart.author: Rita Patel
deal-techstart.body: Reviewed the brief. Ready for the call.

sarah-chen.author: Sarah Chen
sarah-chen.body: Rita — happy to intro you to Priya at Acme. She's on the same team I used to work with. Also, Jordan at Runners Club is interested in a 30-min call.

sarah-chen.author: Rita Patel
sarah-chen.body: Amazing, thank you! Can you send the intro to Priya today? And I'll set up the Jordan call.

sarah-chen.author: Sarah Chen
sarah-chen.body: Done. Priya should have it. Good luck with TechStart tomorrow — Sarah (the other Sarah!) is great.

priya-shah.author: Priya Shah
priya-shah.body: Got the intro from Sarah. The SOW looks good — running it through legal. Should have an answer by Friday.

priya-shah.author: Rita Patel
priya-shah.body: Thanks Priya! Let me know if legal has any questions. Happy to jump on a call.

jordan-hayes.author: Jordan Hayes
jordan-hayes.body: Rita — Lisa mentioned the Runners Club proposal. I'd like to understand the ROI before we move forward. Can we do 30 mins tomorrow?

jordan-hayes.author: Rita Patel
jordan-hayes.body: Absolutely. How does 4 PM work? I'll send over a value deck beforehand.

jordan-hayes.author: Jordan Hayes
jordan-hayes.body: 4 PM works. Send the deck when you have it.

dana-torres.author: Dana Torres
dana-torres.body: Thanks for the proposal. I'll share with the team and get back to you.

dana-torres.author: Rita Patel
dana-torres.body: Hi Dana — checking in on the Sporty Nation proposal. Happy to answer any questions.

dana-torres.author: Rita Patel
dana-torres.body: Following up. Let me know if there's a better time to connect.

marcus-lee.author: Marcus Lee
marcus-lee.body: Rita — the Acme deal is looking good. I'm pushing for Q3 close. Will loop in legal next week.

marcus-lee.author: Rita Patel
marcus-lee.body: Thanks Marcus! Appreciate your support. Let me know when legal is in the loop.

lisa-park.author: Lisa Park
lisa-park.body: Jordan (our CFO) wants to understand ROI before signing. I've connected you two — he's open to a 30-min call.

lisa-park.author: Rita Patel
lisa-park.body: Perfect, thank you Lisa! I'll send a value deck and set up the call.

lisa-park.author: Lisa Park
lisa-park.body: Sounds good. He's detail-oriented but fair. The deck will help.
